entry.title: For a better 2022
entry.content:
Some notes to prepare for the year 2022.

My Goals

  • Sharpen my old skills
    Javascript, C++
    DS&A
  • Learn new skills
    More about C#
    Blockchain
  • Language
    TOEIC 650
    English speaking
  • Books
    Expert C Deep Secret
    Unix Network Programming

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
function main() {
let i = 0;
let u = 1000;

while (i < 3 * u) {
i++;
}

console.log(‘i <3 u’, i);
}

main();
